privileged_info_summary: Formula Detective is a synthetic task (task_id: formula_detective@1) with 180-second timeout and 15 max steps, medium difficulty. The task uses a corrupted sales commission spreadsheet with 7 sales representatives created by Python ODF script. The commission structure uses tiered rates (5% for ≤$10k, 7% for $10k-$25k, 10% for >$25k) with $500 bonus for Premium status employees when commission exceeds $1,000. Six cells are corrupted (3 commission cells D3/D5/D7 and 3 payout cells F3/F5/F7) requiring formula reconstruction. Test data: Bob Smith ($12k Standard, expects $840 commission/$840 payout), David Lee ($22k Premium, expects $1540 commission/$2040 payout), Frank Wilson ($15k Premium, expects $1050 commission/$1550 payout). Four intact formulas (rows 2,4,6,8) serve as examples. Verification checks formula structure (IF statements with correct thresholds 10000/25000 and rates 5%/7%/10%), calculation accuracy, relative references, and no hard-coded row values. Pass threshold is 85% (5 of 6 criteria). Data is entirely synthetic, created inline by setup script.
